title: Journey E Stage 3 — Expansion Readiness Output
description: Analysis of upsell and expansion opportunities for existing client (products, ARPUs, confidence scoring)

expansion_signals.description: Key indicators suggesting client is ready to expand (min 1 required)

signal.description: Description of expansion signal (e.g., 'exceeding usage limits', 'requesting new features', 'positive NPS trend')

confidence.description: Confidence level for this signal (0-1, where 1 = very confident)

expansion_opportunities.description: Specific expansion products or services (min 1 opportunity required)

product_service.description: Name and brief description of expansion offering

fit_score.description: How well this product/service fits client use case (0-100)

estimated_arpu.description: Estimated additional Annual Recurring Revenue from this expansion

recommended_upsell.description: Top 1-2 upsell recommendations to present to client (exactly 1-2 items)

upsell_item.description: Specific upsell product or service name

roi_estimate.description: Estimated ROI statement for client (e.g., '3-5x payback within 6 months')
